name: Japanese Cookies (Japan)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until stiff. Gradually add sugar and vanilla.
2. Slowly add flour and melted shortening, beating well after each addition.
3. Drop spoonfuls onto a hot, greased baking sheet.
4. Spread thin with the back of a spoon.
5. Bake in an oven preheated to 325 degrees Fahrenheit until crisp.
